{{Quote|We hope to quell armed resistance to our perfectly legitimate action to reclaim our lost assets.|Budmle Otbor|<ref name="Galactic Campaign Guide">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>}}
'''Budmle Otbor''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] and the primary representative of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sucharme]]. He was killed by [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Jai'galaar (clone)|Jai'galaar]] at some point during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
